channel.title: Evaluation Models on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Evaluation Models on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Evaluation models in auto for individual plans
item.description:
GitHub Copilot now includes evaluation models for individual non-enterprise users, and these models may be selected by Copilot auto model selection. Users can disable evaluation-model usage in Copilot.

  • Source: GitHub
